metadata.description: Official Claude Code plugin marketplace by Alpha AI Service Pvt Ltd

plugins.name: cortex
plugins.description: Cortex — SDLC Automation Engine. 54 commands, 13 agents, 27 skills, 7 hooks, 18 reference docs. Forge production-ready software from idea to deployment. Production-ready frontend bar, always-runs-locally standard (one-command boot + verify gate), native Jira integration via the Atlassian MCP server, self-contained meta-process skills + scaffolders for apps, standalone MCP servers, and Claude Code plugins themselves.
